title: Generate a REST API endpoint for User Management
scenario: Create an API endpoint for managing users. The endpoint should allow users to sign up, log in, and log out. The API should handle user authentication and authorization using JSON Web Tokens. The target output should be a Swagger API definition in YAML format. The output should be under 300 words and follow the standard Swagger v2.0 syntax.
constraints: Must include endpoints for user registration, login, and logout
Must use JSON Web Tokens for authentication and authorization

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the Swagger definition follows the standard v2.0 syntax
Verify if the API endpoint includes user registration, login, and logout endpoints, and uses JSON Web Tokens for authentication and authorization
Check if the Swagger definition is clear and easy to read
